enhance.title: AI Studio
enhance.profile_analysis_desc: Upload screenshots for AI personality & style insights
enhance.photo_enhancement_desc: Generate AI-enhanced photos from your analysis
enhance.upload_subtitle: Upload 1-10 screenshots of your social media profile
enhance.both_modes_note: Both modes generate a shareable image
enhance.tip_rate: Tip: Rate community photos while you wait to earn credits
enhance.upload_description: Select up to 6 photos from your gallery. For best results, choose clear photos with good lighting.
enhance.processing_tip: Our AI is examining facial features, composition, and lighting to provide personalized insights.
enhance.analysis_background: Analysis will continue in the background. You'll be notified when complete.
enhance.background_consent_message: This usually takes 1-5 minutes. To protect your progress and credits, the app needs to keep running in the background while you use your phone.
enhance.background_reason_1: AI operations take 1-5 minutes — you can keep using your phone while we work
enhance.background_reason_2: Without background processing, Android may stop the job and your credits would be lost
enhance.vibe_description: Based on your photos, here's how you come across to others.
enhance.strength_1_desc: You show a range of genuine emotions that connect with viewers.
enhance.strength_2_desc: Your photo framing and positioning create visual interest.
enhance.improve_1_desc: Some photos have harsh shadows. Try softer, natural lighting.
enhance.improve_2_desc: Watch for distracting elements behind you in photos.
enhance.photo_enhance_desc: Transform your photos with AI-powered enhancements for lighting, color, and clarity.
enhance.chat_upload_description: Upload 1-5 screenshots of your conversation for AI analysis.
enhance.chat_tip_1: Include both sides of the conversation
enhance.chat_tip_3: Avoid screenshots with personal info visible
enhance.chat_privacy: Your screenshots are analyzed securely and never stored.
enhance.add_photos_hint: Tap to select photos from your gallery
enhance.profile_privacy: Your photos are analyzed securely and never stored or shared.
enhance.share_message: Check out my Vibelytics vibe card! — {}
enhance.choose_vibe_subtitle: Select how you'd like your analysis styled
enhance.glaze_description: Get positive insights and encouragement about your profile
enhance.roast_description: Get brutally honest feedback with constructive suggestions
enhance.mode_info: Both modes provide actionable insights for your dating profile
enhance.glowup_description: Create a before/after video for social media
enhance.communication_match_desc: How well your communication styles align
enhance.processing_hint: This may take up to 6 minutes. You can navigate the app freely.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Review and manage the access Vibelytics uses for alerts, background jobs, and your media flows.
permissions.notifications_desc: Receive alerts when analyses and photo enhancements finish in the background.
permissions.battery_desc: Allow Android battery optimization exemption so long-running AI jobs are less likely to stop early.
permissions.photo_library_desc: Allow photo library access so you can choose images from your library.
permissions.gallery_save_desc: Allow gallery access so Vibelytics can save enhanced photos and vibe cards.
permissions.photo_library_required: Photo library access is needed to choose images.
permissions.gallery_save_required: Gallery access is needed to save photos.
permissions.background_limited: Background work will continue, but notifications or system priority may be limited.
